---
title: ""
date:  "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output: 
  word_document:
    reference_docx: template.docx
params:
  data: NULL
---

## Datenbedarf für BMZ-SG-Berichtserstattung

```{r table, echo=FALSE}
library(flextable)
flextable(params$data, cwidth = 1.2, cheight = 0.15) |>
  hrule(rule = "atleast") |>
  width(j = 1, width = 1.6) |> 
  font(fontname = "Arial") |>
  fontsize(size = 10) |>
  bold(part = "header") |>
  bold(j = 1) 
```
